notes:
### v1.3.3

#### Added
- Added Ship Shop as a weekly roster-wide task with a completion reminder for Rimeria Port, South Kurzan Port, Voldis Port, and Punika Port.
- Added a daily Sea Coin reminder in the custom app header when Ship Shop is tracked. Multiple rosters can be marked individually from the header chooser.
- Added Lost Ark Bible preview links to MeowConnect Logs when an uploaded LOA Logs upstream id is available.
- Added an opt-in MeowConnect friend clear hints setting that can fill missing local raid gate completions from friends' LOA Logs evidence.

#### Fixed
- Rested values now catch up correctly after multiple missed daily resets. The app now counts each missed reset window independently and grants +10 rested only for cycles where the character did not complete Chaos Dungeon or Guardian Raid.
- Dashboard card weekly/daily icons keep stable positions when weekly tasks are untracked.
- Roster-wide completion state is now more resilient when the fallback character row is later removed from a roster.
- MeowConnect Logs now merge overlapping LOA Logs gate entries more accurately and show temporary or borrowed characters with an info marker.

#### Technical Notes
- Reworked rested catch-up in `ResetRepository::update_rested_values` to count completed reset windows instead of checking only the immediately previous daily cycle.
- `rested_values.last_updated` still stores the current reset boundary after catch-up, keeping repeated startup/reset checks idempotent within the same cycle.
- Added `ship_shop` as a frontend/backend roster-wide weekly task and dashboard weekly-summary participant.
- Added hidden `sea_coin` daily completion rows, derived from Ship Shop tracking, with header-level reminder UI and per-roster completion selection.
- Dashboard snapshots now include `roster_completion_status` so roster-wide rows can be read by `roster_id` even when their stored fallback `char_id` no longer belongs to an active character.
- Updated simple roster-wide task writes to update existing rows by row id instead of rebasing completion state to the current first character.
- Added optional `meow_encounter_snapshots.bible_logs_json` support and local `sync_logs`/`encounter_preview` extraction so MeowConnect can show one Lost Ark Bible preview link per gate.
- Added shell permissions for external Lost Ark Bible links while keeping the primary preview in-app.
- Reworked MeowConnect log aggregation to prefer LOA Logs evidence over duplicate manual rows, combine covered gate entries, include connected friends found in `players_json`, and flag temporary borrowed players instead of assigning them as roster-owned characters.
- Added `meowConnect.friendClearHintsEnabled` as a default-off local preference exposed in System Settings > MeowConnect.
- Added `apply_meow_connect_clear_hints` Tauri command. It matches remote encounter player names to local MeowConnect-enabled characters and writes missing gate clears into `completion_status` with `completion_source = 'meow_connect'`.
- MeowConnect clear hints only apply inside the current weekly reset window, use canonical raid gate session ids, and never overwrite rows that are already `is_completed = 1` from manual, LOA Logs, or another source.
- After MeowConnect applies local clear hints, the frontend reloads the local snapshot, uploads the updated MeowConnect snapshot, and dispatches `raid-completed` so dashboard gold progress and To Do state refresh immediately.
